articles.title: Trump tells Congress ceasefire means he does not need their approval for Iran war
articles.summary: The president writes that hostilities "have terminated" because of the ceasefire, arguing he does not need congressional authorisation.

articles.title: Billions of meals at risk due to Iran war, says fertiliser boss
articles.summary: A shortage of fertiliser due to the Iran conflict could reduce crop yields and push prices higher, says the boss of Yara.

articles.title: French PM fuels row with trip to buy baguettes

articles.summary: Mladic, 84, was jailed for life for genocide, war crimes and crimes against humanity during the Bosnian war in 1992-95.

articles.title: Turkish police arrest more than 500 people at May Day rallies
articles.summary: Turkey sees significant police deployments on 1 May each year, when marches led by workers and unions are held.
